landing.heroTitle: A modern presence platform your clients and teams can trust.
landing.heroSubtitle: Launch company workspaces, onboard employees in bulk, send secure invitations, and monitor geofenced attendance from one polished SaaS dashboard.
landing.sectionTitle: Everything a company needs before go-live.
landing.featureGeofenceBody: GPS, photo fallback, QR kiosk mode, and supervisor review keep attendance evidence usable without blocking employees.
landing.featureOnboardingBody: Create a workspace, configure sites and schedules, then import employees in batches with invitation links.
landing.featureReviewBody: Audit logs, exports, notifications, and channel policies help teams move from demo to real operations.

employee.loginSubtitle: Use the invitation or credentials from your employer to reach your mobile clock-in workspace.
employee.loginCardBody: Most employees start from the invitation email. If you received manual credentials, use the code or PIN tabs.
employee.loginAssistantBody: Need your company slug or employee ID? Ask your manager to send an invitation from the admin team page.
employee.loginStepInvite: Open the invite from your employer
employee.loginStepChoose: Choose magic link, email code, or PIN
employee.loginStepPunch: Clock in when you arrive on site
employee.loginMagicHint: We’ll email you a one-time sign-in link.
employee.loginMagicSent: Check your email for the link.
employee.loginDemoHint: DEMO: copy employee UUID from the employer portal.
employee.loginMagicEmployerNote: Magic links are sent by your employer from the team page. If you do not have one yet, ask your manager to resend it.
employee.loginManualBody: Enter the company slug and employee ID exactly as provided. PIN sign-in works even when email delivery is not configured.
employee.loginHelpBody: Ask an admin to verify your email, reset your PIN, or resend a magic link from Employees.
employee.loginNeedSession: Open your magic link in this browser first, then scan again.
employee.pointerGpsHint: GPS is required unless photo proof mode is active.
employee.pointerPhotoMode: Photo proof required (GPS unavailable). Attach a photo.
employee.settingsNotifyPush: App push notifications (install the mobile app and allow alerts)
employee.settingsVerifyHint: Requires Redis and SMTP (email) or the WhatsApp bridge.
employee.settingsLoginPrompt: Sign in to manage contact methods.
employee.controllerSubtitle: Colleagues scan this QR with their own phone (camera or QR app). Each person must be signed in to the employee portal on that device, then they confirm in/out for their own account.
employee.controllerManualHint: Work email or employee UUID, their PIN, and a required selfie. This only records attendance — no login session on this kiosk device. In/out follows their punch cycle automatically.
employee.controllerManualPhotoDisabled: Your employer disabled photo attestation; manual selfie punch is unavailable.
employee.controllerDisabled: Your employer has not enabled kiosk mode for your account.
employee.scanNoTokenBody: This flow needs the full URL you get by scanning the on-site QR (it includes a session token in the address). Use your phone’s camera or a QR app on the code shown on the tablet or host phone at the site — don’t open a scan page from the menu without scanning that QR first.
employee.scanNeedMagic: Sign in to the employee app on this phone first (PIN, code, or magic link). Then open this page again—re-scan the QR or use the same link.
employee.pointerKioskCardBody: On site only: scan the QR on the kiosk display with your phone (you must already be signed in to the employee portal on that device).
employee.pointerKioskScanExplain: Don’t open an empty “scan” page from the menu — it has no token. The token must come from the QR shown on the kiosk.
employee.pointerKioskOnlyHint: Your employer has limited pointage to kiosk scan only. Use the instructions above when you are at a site with a visible QR.
employee.pointerAppPunchDisabled: No pointage method is available for this account. Contact your employer.
employee.pointerGpsRequired: GPS is required and could not be obtained. Your employer has disabled photo-only attestation.
employee.pointerPhotoOnlyHint: Your employer has set photo attestation for this device. Add a photo to confirm.
employee.controllerBorneCompanyOff: The employer has turned off the on-site kiosk (host QR) for the whole company.
employee.nudgeClockInBody: Your shift is scheduled for {{time}}. Record your arrival on the Clock screen.
employee.nudgeClockInBodyNoTime: You have not clocked in yet. Open Clock when you arrive on site.

employer.dashboardSubtitle: Per employee and per day for the selected range.
employer.dashboardEmptyBody: Create employees and record punches to see analytics.
employer.sitesSubtitle: Geofences for validating punches on site.
employer.sitesEmpty: No sites yet — add your first location.
employer.sitesMapHint: Click the map or drag the pin to set the geofence center. Adjust radius below.
employer.schedulesSubtitle: Day templates compared to real punches.
employer.schedulesRulesNote: Detailed rules are stored on save.
employer.schedulesTapToEdit: Tap to edit the week grid.
employer.employeesSubtitle: Cards, contact channels, default site, and invitations.
employer.batchSubtitle: Paste a spreadsheet export, apply defaults, create employee accounts, and send invitation magic links where email is configured.
employer.batchPasteHint: Accepted columns: name, email, phone, PIN. Commas, semicolons, and tabs are supported.
employer.batchSendInvitesHint: Uses email magic links. If Redis or SMTP is not configured, accounts are still created and the wizard shows the delivery reason.
employer.welcomeTitle: Get your company ready for launch.
employer.welcomeSubtitle: Set your sites, schedules, employee roster, and first test punch from one guided launch checklist.
employer.welcomeSlugHint: Employees use this slug when signing in manually.
employer.settingsAttendanceHint: Choose which channels are allowed. At least one of GPS, photo, or scan-from-kiosk must stay on so people can still record attendance. “Host QR” is the tablet/phone that shows the code for others to scan.
employer.settingsAttendanceGps: GPS punch from the employee app (normal geofence)
employer.settingsAttendancePhoto: Photo attestation when GPS is unavailable
employer.settingsAttendanceKioskScan: Scan someone else’s on-site QR to punch (each person uses their own signed-in phone)
employer.settingsAttendanceBorne: Host the on-site QR (kiosk / “borne” — also requires per-employee permission in the team list)
employer.settingsAttendanceOneRequired: Keep at least one of GPS, photo, or kiosk scan enabled.
employer.settingsWaRelinkConfirm: This logs out the WhatsApp session and shows a new QR. Continue?
employer.settingsWaNoQrNeeded: Already connected — no QR to display.
employer.geofenceReviewSubtitle: Review out-of-zone or photo-only punches before payroll and client reporting.
employer.geofenceReviewEmptyBody: Out-of-zone and photo-only punches will appear here for supervisor decisions.

auth.employerLoginSubtitle: Access your command center for attendance, teams, geofence reviews, and exports.
auth.employerRegisterSubtitle: Launch a secure company workspace and invite your first employees in minutes.
auth.assistantBodyLogin: Returning admins land on analytics. If this is your first production run, open Welcome after sign-in to finish sites, schedules, and employee invitations.
auth.assistantBodyRegister: After this step, the guided welcome screen will help you configure work sites, schedules, batch imports, and first test punches.
auth.adminGuideBody: Welcome and Employees include the first-time checklist and import wizard.
auth.complianceBody: Audit logs, geofence review, and exports are available after sign-in.
auth.registerCardSubtitle: Your company slug is generated automatically after registration.
auth.firstTimeLoginBody: Sign in, then use the Welcome page as your production checklist. It points you to sites, schedules, employee imports, and test punches.
auth.firstTimeRegisterBody: Create the company workspace now. The next screen gives you a guided setup path and keeps the company slug ready for employees.
